raw_request: Provide the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate for synthetic segment S-9, including the measurement window and the released value.
intent: Bot-adjusted 30-day retention is a controlling release criterion and the visible raw retention cannot establish it.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9 only; bot-adjusted 30-day retention for the decision-relevant 30-day window.
expected_value_basis: A released value at or above 10% would satisfy the retention limb, while a value below 10% would rule out release under the disclosed rule.
